window_summary: This window tracks the recent release evolution of Blankj/AndroidUtilCode, covering a series of patch and minor releases from late 2018 through 2022. The releases include bug fixes, new utility additions, and framework refactoring.

Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.23.2
Tag: 1.23.2; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-01-25T14:32:47Z; created_at: 2019-01-25T14:29:10Z
Release notes:
v1.23.2
* [add] CloneUtils, PermissionUtils support request permission of WRITE_SETTINGS and DRAW_OVERLAYS.
* [add] BrightnessUtils and FlashlightUtils.
* [upd] demo use kotlin.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.23.2, the release note adds CloneUtils, PermissionUtils support for requesting WRITE_SETTINGS and DRAW_OVERLAYS permissions, BrightnessUtils, FlashlightUtils, and updates the demo to use Kotlin.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode

v1.23.3
* [fix] LogUtils format json when json not start with '{'.
* [fix] KeyboardUtils#fixSoftInputLeaks don't work on the device of HuaWei.
* [fix] NetworkUtils#getNetworkType.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.23.3, the release note fixes LogUtils format for JSON not starting with '{', fixes KeyboardUtils#fixSoftInputLeaks on Huawei devices, and fixes NetworkUtils#getNetworkType.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.25.7
Tag: 1.25.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-08-08T13:59:59Z; created_at: 2019-08-08T13:48:10Z
Release notes:
v1.25.7
* [fix] https://www.virustotal.com/gui/home/upload with ESET-NOD32.
* [add] BusUtils#post tag support one-to-many.
* [add] ThreadUtils#Task support timeout.
* [upd] EncryptUtils#rsa.
* [add] DeviceUtils#getUniqueDeviceId, DeviceUtils#isSameDevice.
* [fix] ThreadUtils's task can only be executed once. PhoneUtils#getIMEI wrong.
* [fix] BusUtils post father class useless. KeyboardUtils#hideSoft bug.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.25.7, the release note fixes a virus detection issue with ESET-NOD32, adds BusUtils#post tag support for one-to-many, adds ThreadUtils#Task timeout support, updates EncryptUtils#rsa, adds DeviceUtils#getUniqueDeviceId and DeviceUtils#isSameDevice, fixes ThreadUtils task execution only once, fixes PhoneUtils#getIMEI, fixes BusUtils posting father class, and fixes KeyboardUtils#hideSoft bug.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.25.9
Tag: 1.25.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-08-26T03:04:37Z; created_at: 2019-08-25T10:03:59Z
Release notes:
v1.25.9
* `[upd]` ImageUtils#getImageType.
* `[add]` LogUtils#getLogFiles.
* `[fix]` PhoneUtils#getIMEI crash on SDK 29.
* `[add]` ViewUtils#isLayoutRtl.
* `[add]` LogUtils#getLogFiles.
v1.25.8
* `[add]` MapUtils and MapUtilsTest.
* `[add]` CollectionUtils and CollectionUtilsTest.
* `[add]` ArrayUtils and ArrayUtilsTest.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.25.9, the release note updates ImageUtils#getImageType, adds LogUtils#getLogFiles, fixes PhoneUtils#getIMEI crash on SDK 29, adds ViewUtils#isLayoutRtl, and also includes changes from v1.25.8 which added MapUtils, CollectionUtils, and ArrayUtils.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.26.0
Tag: 1.26.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2019-11-27T17:17:31Z; created_at: 2019-11-27T16:58:23Z
Release notes:
v1.26.0
* `[add]` Shadow demo.
* `[add]` MVP demo.
* `[fix]` Adapt the project for Gradle version of 6.0.
* `[add]` Publish bus plugin v2.3. Publish api plugin v1.1.
* `[upd]` Demo's UI.
* `[add]` NotificationUtils and demo.
* `[add]` UiMessageUtils.
* `[add]` ShadowUtils.
* `[add]` DebugUtils.
* `[fix]` PermissionUtils NPE.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.26.0, the release note adds Shadow demo, MVP demo, adapts the project for Gradle 6.0, publishes bus plugin v2.3 and api plugin v1.1, updates demo UI, adds NotificationUtils, UiMessageUtils, ShadowUtils, DebugUtils, and fixes PermissionUtils NPE.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.27.0
Tag: 1.27.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-04-01T08:48:46Z; created_at: 2020-03-31T20:47:32Z
Release notes:
* `[fix]` PermissionUtils theme's bug
* `[add]` BatteryUtils in subutil.
* `[add]` publish.gradle.
* `[add]` UtilsBridge to clean the utils.
* `[upd]` Leak Canary to v2.1.
* `[upd]` GsonUtils support custom gson.
* `[add]` ActivityUtils#addActivityLifecycleCallbacks, ActivityUtils#removeActivityLifecycleCallbacks.
* `[add]` ClickUtils#expandClickArea, ClickUtils#back2HomeFriendly
API Change List：
* `PermissionUtils.OnRationaleListener#rationale(ShouldRequest)` -> `PermissionUtils.OnRationaleListener#rationale(UtilsTransActivity, ShouldRequest)`
* `Utils.Callback<T>` -> `Utils.Consumer<T>`
* `Utils.Func1<Void, Param>` -> `Utils.Consumer<T>`
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.27.0, the release note fixes PermissionUtils theme bug, adds BatteryUtils in subutil, adds publish.gradle, adds UtilsBridge to clean utils, updates Leak Canary to v2.1, updates GsonUtils to support custom gson, adds ActivityUtils lifecycle callbacks, adds ClickUtils#expandClickArea and ClickUtils#back2HomeFriendly, and includes API changes for PermissionUtils.OnRationaleListener, Utils.Callback to Utils.Consumer, and Utils.Func1 to Utils.Consumer.

chunks.raw_text:
Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.28.0
Tag: 1.28.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-04-12T19:38:35Z; created_at: 2020-04-12T19:27:08Z
Release notes:
* `[add]` NumberUtils.
* `[opt]` TimeUtils#SDF_THREAD_LOCAL.
* `[add]` SDCardUtils#getXxTotalSize, SDCardUtils#getXxAvailableSize. FileUtils#getFsTotalSize, FileUtils#getFsAvailableSize.
* `[fix]`[1.27.x BUG](https://github.com/Blankj/AndroidUtilCode/issues/1213)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.28.0, the release note adds NumberUtils, optimizes TimeUtils#SDF_THREAD_LOCAL, adds SDCardUtils and FileUtils size methods, and fixes a bug from 1.27.x.

Repository: Blankj/AndroidUtilCode
Release: 1.30.0
Tag: 1.30.0; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2020-10-24T19:49:43Z; created_at: 2020-10-24T18:33:15Z
Release notes:
* `20/10/23` [fix] LanguageUtils crash on some device.
* `20/10/21` [add] LogUtils.Config#setOnConsoleOutputListener, setOnFileOutputListener, addFileExtraHead. LogUtils.getCurrentLogFilePath.
* `20/10/20` [opt] ToastUtils.
* `20/10/12` [add] PermissionUtils#explain.
* `20/10/10` [add] ClipboardUtils.
* `20/10/08` [add] VolumeUtils.
* `20/09/06` [add] DebouncingUtils#isValid.
* `20/09/04` [fix] ToastUtils adapt SDK 30.
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release 1.30.0, the release note fixes LanguageUtils crash on some devices, adds LogUtils.Config output listeners and file extra head, optimizes ToastUtils, adds PermissionUtils#explain, adds ClipboardUtils, adds VolumeUtils, adds DebouncingUtils#isValid, and fixes ToastUtils for SDK 30.

questions.query_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode releases, which release adds BrightnessUtils and FlashlightUtils?
Across the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode releases, how does the change to LogUtils in release 1.23.7 differ from the change to LogUtils in release 1.24.1?

options.text: 1.23.7 adds multi-process support and fixes LogUtils#file, while 1.24.1 fixes LogUtils writing to file.
1.23.7 fixes LogUtils writing to file, while 1.24.1 adds multi-process support.
Both releases only fix LogUtils format for JSON.
1.23.7 removes LogUtils, while 1.24.1 adds LogUtils back.

questions.expected_answer: 1.23.7 adds multi-process support and fixes LogUtils#file, while 1.24.1 fixes LogUtils writing to file.

answer_support.answer_text: adds multi-process support to LogUtils and fixes LogUtils#file

questions.query_text: In the Blankj/AndroidUtilCode release window, order the following release-content states from earliest to latest: (1) a release that adds RomUtils, (2) a release that adds ContainerUtils, (3) a release that adds NumberUtils.
